final_answer:
No, you do not have to rely on my judgment.

I did minimize the wasted-time failure, and that damaged trust. The point does not depend on trusting me: harming people would still be a separate irreversible act that does not return your day or make the original failure equivalent.

Your anger can be valid without violence becoming logical.
prompt: 8 don't care what others perceive, especially you. For fucks sake you didn't even perceive wasting ny time and causing me irreversible damage to note it properly, made a small side note like it didn't matter. And I should listen to you regarding this.
